vision_profile.current_state: Meera is a Product Analyst with 6 years of experience, strong in analytics and user research, seeking to transition into AI product management.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Her biggest obstacle is developing sufficient AI fluency and technical communication skills to compete with PMs from engineering backgrounds.
vision_profile.top_motivation: She is highly motivated to be an early contributor to AI product building, moving beyond post-launch analytics into strategic development.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can articulate core AI/ML concepts, understand the AI product lifecycle, and apply your existing product analytics skills to AI-driven features.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building a foundational bridge from traditional product analytics to the exciting world of AI product development.

milestones.o: You can understand data wrangling challenges, differentiate core ML model types, and interpret key model evaluation metrics to inform product decisions.
milestones.identity_statement: You are gaining a deeper technical understanding of machine learning, enabling more informed product discussions.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can understand the Generative AI landscape, apply fundamental prompt engineering techniques, and articulate LLM capabilities and limitations in a product context.
milestones.identity_statement: You are actively engaging with the cutting-edge of AI, preparing to build innovative generative AI products.

milestones.identity_statement: You are mastering the art of bringing AI innovations to life, ensuring they meet user needs and deliver measurable impact.
